sentences.arabic: يَعْمَلُ بَعْضُ النَّاسِ كَصُنَّاعِ مُحْتَوَى عَلَى الْيُوتِيُوبِ وَالْمِنَصَّاتِ الْأُخْرَى.
sentences.translation: Neki ljudi rade kao kreatori sadržaja na YouTubeu i drugim platformama.
sentences.translationEn: Some people work as content creators on YouTube and other platforms.

sentences.arabic: يَقُومُونَ بِإِنْتَاجِ فِيدْيُوهَاتٍ تَعْلِيمِيَّةٍ أَوْ تَرْفِيهِيَّةٍ لِمُتَابِعِيهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Oni proizvode obrazovne ili zabavne videozapise za svoje pratioce.
sentences.translationEn: They produce educational or entertaining videos for their followers.

sentences.arabic: يَتَطَلَّبُ النَّجَاحُ فِي هَذَا الْمَجَالِ الْكَثِيرَ مِنَ الْعَمَلِ الشَّاقِّ وَالْإِبْدَاعِ.
sentences.translation: Uspjeh u ovoj oblasti zahtijeva mnogo truda i kreativnosti.
sentences.translationEn: Success in this field requires a lot of hard work and creativity.

sentences.arabic: يُتَابِعُ كَثِيرٌ مِنَ الشَّبَابِ هَؤُلَاءِ الْمُؤَثِّرِينَ لِتَعَلُّمِ مَهَارَاتٍ جَدِيدَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Mnogi mladi ljudi prate ove influensere kako bi naučili nove vještine.
sentences.translationEn: Many young people follow these influencers to learn new skills.
